violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. (Application printed for the PIC at the time of inspection.) New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025

At the time of inspection, ice for beverage service was observed stored in a well of the 3 bay sink. Ice is to be stored in a separate location protected from sources of possible contamination. Per the PIC, Ice is to be stored in buckets for beverage service. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the bleach sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. Test Strips obtained at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

The ice machine is lacking a proper air gap (currently equipped with an air break). A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024
